nasb.text: The apostles *gathered together with Jesus; and they reported to Him all that they had done and taught.

esv.text: The apostles returned to Jesus and told him all that they had done and taught.

cnv.text: 使徒們回來聚集在耶穌跟前，把他們所作和所教導的一切都報告給他聽。

ccb.text: 使徒们聚集在耶稣身边，向祂报告事工和传道的经过。

csbs.text: 使徒们聚集到耶稣那里，把他们所做的和教导的一切告诉了他。
